subject: Fwd: Staff Oppurtunity
body:
what do you think?
 
Sincerely,

Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison  Avenue
Fourth Floor
New York, New York 10022

**************Biggest Grammy Award surprises of all time on AOL Music.     
(http://music.aol.com/grammys/pictures/never-won-a-grammy?NCID=aolcmp003000000025
48)


From: "Paul Gandy" <pgandy@globaltechdb.com>
Subject: Staff Oppurtunity
Date: Wed, 06 Feb 2008 16:38:43 GMT
To: dkiesq@aol.com

Darren,

 

Hope all is well. I just received a call from a fellow in St. Thomas
that has been managing construction/facility projects for Reliance
Housing in USVI. I have met with him a few times he seems like a very
capable engineer/construction manager. His assignment with Reliance will
end in a month or so and he is looking for his next position. I will
likely interview him for work stateside, however if you folks are
looking for a facilities manager/project manager in USVI I could forward
his resume when it arrives.

 

Best regards,

 

Paul Gandy, PE

President

Globaltech, Inc.
